Compliance.description: POPIA-compliant, SA registered, CPA compliance for dealers listed, no regulatory issues or fines found in 2025/2026.

Customer Satisfaction.description: HelloPeter 2.42/5 (97 reviews, NPS 15, 39% 1-star); App 3.8/5 GP 11.4k revs; Trustpilot 2.7/5; mixed.

Product Value.description: Largest SA marketplace 1M+ listings; strong tools; no buyer protection as intermediary.

Innovation.description: AI-powered recommendations, valuation tools, AR exterior view, iOS/Android apps, MotorHappy integration.

Customer Support.description: HelloPeter poor NPS 15; complaints on admin/fraudulent listings; limited real-time support.

Accessibility & Security.description: App biometrics, POPIA compliance, web/app access, no major security incidents 2025/2026.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Private listings R99-199; dealer subscriptions (vary); free browsing

socialSentiment.summary: Mixed: complaints on HelloPeter/Trustpilot (scams/fraud/admin); app rated 3.8 mixed; positive for selection.
